---
title: "Audit des sources SIRENE"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(readr)
```

## 1) Sources cibles

```{r paths}
cours_dir_candidates <- c("Cours", ".", "..")
cours_dir <- cours_dir_candidates[
  dir.exists(file.path(cours_dir_candidates, "data"))
][1]
if (is.na(cours_dir)) {
  stop("Dossier Cours introuvable depuis: ", getwd())
}

raw_dir <- file.path(cours_dir, "data", "raw")
actif_dir <- file.path(cours_dir, "data", "actif")
processed_dir <- file.path(cours_dir, "data", "processed")
dir.create(processed_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

sources <- data.frame(
  source_id = c(
    "raw_dataseed_sirene_2",
    "raw_dataseed_sirene_1",
    "actif_dataseed_sirene_1"
  ),
  dsn = c(raw_dir, raw_dir, actif_dir),
  layer = c("dataseed-sirene-2", "dataseed-sirene-1", "dataseed-sirene-1"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    shp_path = file.path(dsn, paste0(layer, ".shp")),
    exists = file.exists(shp_path)
  )

sources
```

## 2) Fonctions utilitaires

```{r helpers}
normalize_sirene_names <- function(x) {
  if (!"siret" %in% names(x) && "SIRET" %in% names(x)) x <- rename(x, siret = SIRET)
  if (!"libellecomm" %in% names(x) && "Commune_de_" %in% names(x)) x <- rename(x, libellecomm = Commune_de_)
  if (!"etatadminis" %in% names(x) && "Etat_admini" %in% names(x)) x <- rename(x, etatadminis = Etat_admini)
  if (!"enseigne1et" %in% names(x) && "Enseigne_de" %in% names(x)) x <- rename(x, enseigne1et = Enseigne_de)
  if (!"enseigne2et" %in% names(x) && "Enseigne_de.1" %in% names(x)) x <- rename(x, enseigne2et = Enseigne_de.1)
  if (!"enseigne3et" %in% names(x) && "Enseigne_de.2" %in% names(x)) x <- rename(x, enseigne3et = Enseigne_de.2)
  if (!"denominatio" %in% names(x) && "Denominatio" %in% names(x)) x <- rename(x, denominatio = Denominatio)
  if (!"activitepri.1" %in% names(x) && "Activite_pr.1" %in% names(x)) x <- rename(x, activitepri.1 = Activite_pr.1)
  if (!"activitepri.2" %in% names(x) && "Activite_pr.2" %in% names(x)) x <- rename(x, activitepri.2 = Activite_pr.2)
  if (!"activitepri" %in% names(x) && "Activite_pr" %in% names(x)) x <- rename(x, activitepri = Activite_pr)
  x
}

ensure_cols <- function(x, cols) {
  for (col in cols) {
    if (!col %in% names(x)) x[[col]] <- NA_character_
  }
  x
}

clean_chr <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x %in% c("", "NA", "N/A", "NULL", "[ND]", "ND", "Missing", "MISSING", "SANS ENSEIGNE")] <- NA_character_
  x
}

extract_activity_code <- function(df) {
  cols <- c("activitepri.1", "activitepri.2", "activitepri", "activiteprincipaleetablissement")
  cols <- cols[cols %in% names(df)]
  if (length(cols) == 0) return(rep(NA_character_, nrow(df)))

  out <- rep(NA_character_, nrow(df))
  for (col in cols) {
    v <- as.character(df[[col]])
    fill <- is.na(out) | out == ""
    out[fill] <- v[fill]
  }
  out
}

extract_brand_label <- function(df) {
  dplyr::coalesce(
    clean_chr(df$enseigne1et),
    clean_chr(df$enseigne2et),
    clean_chr(df$enseigne3et),
    clean_chr(df$denominatio)
  )
}

extract_year <- function(x) {
  if (inherits(x, "Date") || inherits(x, "POSIXct") || inherits(x, "POSIXt")) {
    return(as.integer(format(x, "%Y")))
  }

  sx <- as.character(x)
  m <- regexpr("(19|20)[0-9]{2}", sx, perl = TRUE)
  out <- rep(NA_integer_, length(sx))
  ok <- !is.na(m) & m > 0
  if (any(ok)) {
    len <- attr(m, "match.length")
    out[ok] <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(substr(sx[ok], m[ok], m[ok] + len[ok] - 1)))
  }
  out[!dplyr::between(out, 1900L, 2100L)] <- NA_integer_
  out
}
```

## 3) Lecture des sources

```{r load}
datasets <- list()
source_status <- sources %>%
  mutate(read_ok = FALSE, error = NA_character_, n_rows = NA_integer_, n_cols = NA_integer_)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(sources))) {
  src <- sources[i, ]
  if (!src$exists) next

  obj <- tryCatch(
    st_read(dsn = src$dsn, layer = src$layer, quiet = TRUE),
    error = function(e) e
  )

  if (inherits(obj, "error")) {
    source_status$error[i] <- conditionMessage(obj)
    next
  }

  obj <- normalize_sirene_names(obj)
  obj <- ensure_cols(
    obj,
    c(
      "siret", "libellecomm", "etatadminis",
      "enseigne1et", "enseigne2et", "enseigne3et", "denominatio",
      "activitepri.1", "activitepri.2", "activitepri"
    )
  )

  datasets[[src$source_id]] <- obj
  source_status$read_ok[i] <- TRUE
  source_status$n_rows[i] <- nrow(obj)
  source_status$n_cols[i] <- ncol(obj)
}

source_status
```

## 4) Resume global par source

```{r global-summary}
zone_coms <- c(
  "GRENOBLE", "MEYLAN", "LA TRONCHE",
  "CORENC", "SAINT-MARTIN-LE-VINOUX", "SAINT-EGREVE"
)

summary_rows <- list()
top_enseigne_all <- list()
top_enseigne_4711_zone <- list()
top_activity_all <- list()
year_summary <- list()
columns_by_source <- list()

for (id in names(datasets)) {
  x <- datasets[[id]]
  columns_by_source[[id]] <- names(x)

  x <- x %>%
    mutate(
      libellecomm_u = toupper(trimws(as.character(libellecomm))),
      etatadminis_u = toupper(trimws(as.character(etatadminis))),
      activity_code = extract_activity_code(.),
      activity_code_norm = toupper(gsub("[^A-Z0-9]", "", trimws(as.character(activity_code))))
    )

  brand_label <- extract_brand_label(x)
  x$enseigne_display <- ifelse(is.na(brand_label), "ENSEIGNE_INCONNUE", brand_label)

  active_mask <- x$etatadminis_u %in% c("ACTIF", "A")
  zone_mask <- x$libellecomm_u %in% zone_coms
  super_mask <- grepl("^4711", x$activity_code_norm)

  row <- data.frame(
    source_id = id,
    n_rows = nrow(x),
    n_cols = ncol(x),
    n_geom_empty = sum(st_is_empty(x)),
    crs_epsg = ifelse(is.na(st_crs(x)$epsg), NA_character_, as.character(st_crs(x)$epsg)),
    n_active = sum(active_mask, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_zone_active = sum(active_mask & zone_mask, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_4711 = sum(super_mask, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_4711_active = sum(super_mask & active_mask, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_4711_zone_active = sum(super_mask & active_mask & zone_mask, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_enseigne1_non_na = sum(!is.na(clean_chr(x$enseigne1et))),
    n_brand_known = sum(!is.na(brand_label)),
    n_enseigne_unknown = sum(x$enseigne_display == "ENSEIGNE_INCONNUE", na.rm = TRUE),
    n_enseigne_unique = dplyr::n_distinct(x$enseigne_display[x$enseigne_display != "ENSEIGNE_INCONNUE"]),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  summary_rows[[id]] <- row

  top_enseigne_all[[id]] <- x %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    count(enseigne_display, sort = TRUE) %>%
    slice_head(n = 20) %>%
    mutate(source_id = id, scope = "all")

  top_enseigne_4711_zone[[id]] <- x %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    filter(super_mask, active_mask, zone_mask) %>%
    count(enseigne_display, sort = TRUE) %>%
    slice_head(n = 20) %>%
    mutate(source_id = id, scope = "4711_zone_active")

  top_activity_all[[id]] <- x %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    count(activity_code, sort = TRUE) %>%
    slice_head(n = 20) %>%
    mutate(source_id = id)

  year_cols <- names(x)[grepl("annee|date", names(x), ignore.case = TRUE)]
  if (length(year_cols) > 0) {
    ys <- list()
    for (col in year_cols) {
      vec <- x[[col]]
      y <- extract_year(vec)
      tab <- sort(table(y), decreasing = TRUE)
      top_years <- if (length(tab) == 0) {
        NA_character_
      } else {
        paste(
          paste0(names(tab)[seq_len(min(5, length(tab)))], " (", as.integer(tab[seq_len(min(5, length(tab)))]), ")"),
          collapse = "; "
        )
      }

      ys[[col]] <- data.frame(
        source_id = id,
        column = col,
        n_non_na = sum(!is.na(vec)),
        n_year_detected = sum(!is.na(y)),
        min_year = ifelse(any(!is.na(y)), min(y, na.rm = TRUE), NA_integer_),
        max_year = ifelse(any(!is.na(y)), max(y, na.rm = TRUE), NA_integer_),
        top_years = top_years,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    year_summary[[id]] <- bind_rows(ys)
  }
}

summary_table <- bind_rows(summary_rows)
top_enseigne_all_tbl <- bind_rows(top_enseigne_all)
top_enseigne_4711_zone_tbl <- bind_rows(top_enseigne_4711_zone)
top_activity_all_tbl <- bind_rows(top_activity_all)
year_summary_tbl <- bind_rows(year_summary)

summary_table
```

## 5) Colonnes disponibles (qui contient quoi)

```{r columns-audit}
if (length(columns_by_source) > 0) {
  all_cols <- sort(unique(unlist(columns_by_source)))
  col_presence <- data.frame(column = all_cols, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  for (id in names(columns_by_source)) {
    col_presence[[id]] <- all_cols %in% columns_by_source[[id]]
  }

  col_presence$n_sources_present <- rowSums(col_presence[, names(columns_by_source), drop = FALSE])
  col_presence <- col_presence %>% arrange(desc(n_sources_present), column)

  common_cols <- col_presence %>% filter(n_sources_present == length(columns_by_source))
  specific_cols <- col_presence %>% filter(n_sources_present == 1)

  list(
    common_columns_count = nrow(common_cols),
    specific_columns_count = nrow(specific_cols)
  )
} else {
  col_presence <- data.frame()
  common_cols <- data.frame()
  specific_cols <- data.frame()
  "Aucune source chargee."
}
```

```{r print-columns}
head(common_cols, 80)
```

```{r print-specific-columns}
head(specific_cols, 120)
```

## 6) Enseignes et activites

```{r enseignes}
top_enseigne_all_tbl %>%
  arrange(source_id, desc(n))
```

```{r enseignes-4711-zone}
top_enseigne_4711_zone_tbl %>%
  arrange(source_id, desc(n))
```

```{r activities}
top_activity_all_tbl %>%
  arrange(source_id, desc(n))
```

## 7) Analyse des champs annee/date

```{r years}
year_summary_tbl %>%
  arrange(source_id, column)
```

## 8) Exports CSV

```{r exports}
write_csv(source_status, file.path(processed_dir, "sirene_sources_status.csv"))
write_csv(summary_table, file.path(processed_dir, "sirene_sources_summary.csv"))
write_csv(top_enseigne_all_tbl, file.path(processed_dir, "sirene_sources_top_enseigne_all.csv"))
write_csv(top_enseigne_4711_zone_tbl, file.path(processed_dir, "sirene_sources_top_enseigne_4711_zone.csv"))
write_csv(top_activity_all_tbl, file.path(processed_dir, "sirene_sources_top_activity_all.csv"))
write_csv(year_summary_tbl, file.path(processed_dir, "sirene_sources_year_summary.csv"))
if (nrow(col_presence) > 0) {
  write_csv(col_presence, file.path(processed_dir, "sirene_sources_columns_presence.csv"))
}

cat("Fichiers exportes dans: ", processed_dir, "\n", sep = "")
```
